name: Chili Beans from San Francisco Fire Departmen
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the beans with cold water.
2. Bring pot to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat and simmer until tender, adding water as needed.
4. In a skillet, brown ground beef until crumbly.
5. Add onion and sauté until limp.
6. Combine all ingredients except salt, pepper, and hot sauce in the pot.
7. Cover and simmer for three hours or until beans are tender and liquid is somewhat thickened.
8. Stir in hot sauce, then add salt and pepper to taste. Serve.
